since_last: 70% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.05%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.78% · BTC +0.24% · Gold -0.98% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 70% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.05%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.05%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -49.03%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +12.03%, KLAC +9.77%, PANW +8.87%, LRCX +8.43%, CRWD +6.88%. Laggards: HON -49.03%, SOUN -2.18%, AI -2.13%, DLR -2.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.45% at $156.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
